Interface IUNTraceResults

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to utility network trace results.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7390FD02-70C1-4B48-84E7-0AD82C55D401")]
public interface IUNTraceResults

Properties

GlobalFunctionResult[IUNFunction]

Returns the global function result.

object GlobalFunctionResult[IUNFunction function] { get; }

Parameters

function IUNFunction

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsAnySourceDirty

Returns whether any of the sources discovered are dirty.

bool IsAnySourceDirty { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

KFeaturesForKNNFound

Returns whether the number of nearest features found was less than k.

bool KFeaturesForKNNFound { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

PropagatedValue[esriElementType, long, string, esriTracePropagatorFunctionType]

Returns the propagated value for the given element.

object PropagatedValue[esriElementType ElementType, long EID, string AttributeName, esriTracePropagatorFunctionType PropagatorFunctionType] { get; }

ElementType esriElementType
EID long
AttributeName string
PropagatorFunctionType esriTracePropagatorFunctionType

object

AllPropagatedValues(string, esriTracePropagatorFunctionType, out long[], out double[], out long[], out double[])

Returns all propagated values in the subnetwork.

PropagatorFunctionType esriTracePropagatorFunctionType
junctionEIDs long[]
